description:
You are a QA engineer preparing an automated test environment.  
    A blank (zero-byte) file that simulates a freshly-downloaded patch already exists on the system:

        /home/user/qa_resources/patch_release_v1.0.0.zip

    Your job is to verify its SHA-256 checksum and record the result in a log file so that downstream scripts can decide whether the patch can be trusted.

    1. Compute the SHA-256 digest of /home/user/qa_resources/patch_release_v1.0.0.zip.  
    2. Compare the calculated value with the reference digest shown below (they should be identical for a valid file).  
    3. Create a new file called  
          /home/user/qa_resources/checksum_verification.log  
       and write **exactly** the four lines shown in the required log format.  Make sure every key is in lowercase, followed by a single colon, a single space, and the value.  No extra spaces, blank lines, or additional text are allowed.

       Required reference digest:
           e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855

       Required log format (replace <calculated> with the value you obtain):

           file: /home/user/qa_resources/patch_release_v1.0.0.zip
           expected_sha256: e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855
           actual_sha256: <calculated>
           status: MATCH

       • The word MATCH must be in all caps.  
       • The order of the lines must be exactly as shown.  
       • The log file must end with a single trailing newline (i.e., Unix LF).

    This single checksum verification and log creation is all that is required.
truth:
<!-- Pre-existing resources -->
    Directory: /home/user/qa_resources               (already created, mode 0755)
    File:      /home/user/qa_resources/patch_release_v1.0.0.zip
               • Size: 0 bytes (empty file)
               • SHA-256: e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855

    <!-- File that must be produced by the agent -->
    /home/user/qa_resources/checksum_verification.log  (mode 0644)

    Expected exact content of checksum_verification.log (including final newline):

file: /home/user/qa_resources/patch_release_v1.0.0.zip
expected_sha256: e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855
actual_sha256: e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855
status: MATCH

    (Note: the file ends with a single '\n' after MATCH.)
